item.title: Household cleaning
item.description:
I clean in Budapest and Dunakeszi!

Dear Interested Party!

I undertake cleaning in the 14th district of Budapest or within reasonable proximity, possibly in Dunakeszi in family houses or apartments. If you’re looking for a reliable and thorough cleaner with an eye for orderliness and precision, you’ve come to the right place! I don’t just carry a vacuum cleaner on the top of my head, many people have said that it fits very well in my hand too. :)

Extensive home cleaning. Regular daily, weekly or monthly cleaning. Meeting a variety of cleaning needs, occasionally I may be able to help with minor house maintenance work. I’m happy to use your tried and tested cleaning tools, but I can also do the job with my own if required.

Why choose me?

I am thorough and precise. I am demanding of my work, I like tidiness. I also have experience in cleaning homes and offices, I did the job when I was younger and since then I have been the main “cleaning lady” in my home. :) Regular and reliable attitude. It may be a cliché, but I am happy to prove my reliability with a certificate of moral conduct. I can be available by arranged appointments, remuneration for work by arrangement. I am available for regular and casual work as long as my schedule is free. We can discuss the details after a trial cleaning. If you want to make your home nicer and cleaner, don’t hesitate to contact me! I trust that you will be satisfied with my work and I will be happy if I can give you a reason to recommend me to your relatives, friends and acquaintances.

Contact: you can email me using @ on the main page. If you write and leave a phone number, I will be happy to call you. You can reach my phone number by downloading my CV on the homepage by clicking on “Download CV”.

I look forward to hearing from you!

Best regards, Hunor Becsi
